## Added
- **Minecraft 1.21.8 support** — Capture Net now has Fabric and NeoForge builds for 1.21.8, matching the current v0.2.3 feature set: capture passive and neutral mobs — including modded ones, villagers, allays, piglins, and hoglins — and release them anywhere with full NBT preserved (variant, name, age, tame state, and any modded data).

## Notes
- Requires Fabric API (Fabric) or NeoForge. Modpacks can tune the capture filter with the `capturenet:cannot_capture` and `capturenet:always_capturable` datapack tags.
